THE_ARCHITECT.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKY: Are you the Architect? My people need help! They suffer down in the docks, waiting for [blue]Mazaleth[/blue]--
Their misery is self-inflicted. I have better things to do with my time.
What!? Can't you see they need help!? You cannot possibly imagine a nobler cause!
If it is nobility you seek, Nonupeipe is a few floors down. Now begone.
Architect, we are in need, if you could just assist us...!
You again? Haven't I made it clear this isn't [red]my[/red] problem?
[sine]Little birdling[/sine], your feathers are so pretty! Why must you fear them so?
I never asked for them! I meant to save my people, not join them in madness!

The path to a better you isn't always charted, my dear.
May my gift help you connect with your self!
